design_philosophy.core_loop: Play-call selection → execute offensive/defensive plays → manage clock and field position across quarters to score more points than opponent
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Strategic play-calling against opponent intelligence; managing time, downs, and field position under pressure; precision execution of selected plays
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Authentic NFL head coach/quarterback controlling real teams and players in realistic football simulation with broadcast-style presentation
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: First Madden with official NFL team license, establishing the series' core commitment to authenticity and realism over arcade abstraction. Introduces deliberate pacing improvements (rotating screen for perspective changes rather than instant reversals) that prioritize player orientation and immersion over speed. Emphasizes strategic depth through new play-call modes and bluff mechanics rather than twitch reflexes.

difficulty.checkpointing: Game progresses by quarters; can load/restart from beginning of quarters
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player selects difficulty level and opponent intelligence; can adjust playstyle based on situation (play-call mode, bluff plays available). Strategic depth provides natural difficulty scaling through opponent adaptation.

progression.unlock_mechanism: Super Bowl teams available without codes (first in series). Genesis/SNES versions had different rosters reflecting 1993-1994 NFL season.
replayability_hooks: Play as any official NFL team from 1993-1994 season
Instant replay with full-angle camera rotation for analysis

world_building_techniques: Authentic NFL team logos and uniforms from 1993-1994 season
Official team identity through visual representation
Broadcast-style presentation and commentary (implied by design)

faction_indicators: 32 official NFL teams with distinct visual identities
Player allegiance signaled through team selection and uniforms
danger_signals: Turnover risk in critical game moments
environmental_storytelling: Stadium visuals and team uniforms convey team identity
Score display and clock create narrative tension
Real season scheduling reflects authentic NFL calendar

sources_used: Wikipedia - Madden NFL '94 (gameplay mechanics, development, licensing, reception)
